title: Yamato Stands Against Kaido
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Kozuki Alliance, Unknown person #14, Yamato, Kaido, Unknown person #15 as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: For the rest of my life!!

dialogue.speaker: Kozuki Alliance
dialogue.text: You want to be Kozukii Open, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: That man captivated all of us too...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh, how is a disgrace Samural meant to introduce himself? I'm... nobody important...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I want to read this logbook,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: But there are lots of big words.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If this keeps up, you're not going to see the battle that open predicted will happen in 20 years...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No... when the time comes, I'll fight for wano...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 'Then I'll go out to sea... and get much... much... stronger...'

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: That's the spirit. In that case...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can make our contribution to that future battle by ensuring your survival...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...is a little too long for us to wait.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Samural- San!! If you do this, my father will--

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We cannot just sit here and starve like stray dogs!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: We never had any intention of yielding!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Samurai have broken out of amano- Wato!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are no easy answers in this world,

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 42 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
